model.note: Primary case maps UNI volume to Binance spot denominator × UNI/Binance spot share, sampled from 2022-present; blended 70% MS30/MS180 + 30% MS7/MS30 velocity decays over 12M; 25% LP fee switch + 0.30bps frontend fee; Y3 effective supply includes observed reserved-supply release.

current_gp.binance_spot_proxy_method: BTCUSDT spot quote volume scaled by Blockworks annual Binance spot totals

secondary_chart.label: Historical Mcap / GP (full activation)
secondary_chart.subtitle: Market cap ÷ annualised full-activation GP
secondary_chart.note: Rolling 30D volume with no-lookahead fee rule: min(rolling 30D LP fee bps, trailing 12M LP fee bps). Full activation = 25% LP fees + 0.30bps frontend.
